programme.title: Live: 2026 Women's College World Series
programme.desc: (If necessary).

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Pardon the Interruption
programme.desc: The debate is the story in this fast-paced, half-hour series hosted by former Washington Post sportswriters Tony Kornheiser and Michael Wilbon. The pair engage in high-energy discussions, conduct interviews and often argue over topics not even related to sports. Other sports reporters appear as guests and offer opinions on the top stories of the day.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: NCAA Championship Update
programme.desc: All the latest NCAA national championship action.

programme.title: Live: 2026 Women's College World Series
programme.desc: From Devon Park in Oklahoma City, Okla.

programme.title: Live: NCAA Championship Update
programme.desc: All the latest NCAA national championship action.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Get Up
programme.desc: ESPN's morning show features host Mike Greenberg with a rotating and diverse group of analysts opining about and analyzing the latest news from the world of sports. The two-hour, personality-driven show originates from Hudson Square in Lower Manhattan, a modern media hub for ESPN and The Walt Disney Company's New York-based teams. Greenberg, aka "Greeny," is formerly one-half of ESPN Radio's longt

programme.title: Live: First Take
programme.desc: Stephen A. Smith hosts this weekday morning sports debate show. Smith provides his expert takes on the day's trending sports topics and under-the-radar news. They're regularly joined by veteran analysts and the top guests in sports and entertainment.

programme.title: Live: The Pat McAfee Show
programme.desc: Former NFL punter Pat McAfee brings his humor and candor to the microphone to highlight the day's top stories.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: NBA Today
programme.desc: In-depth, comprehensive daily coverage of all aspects of the NBA from expert analysts.

programme.title: NFL Live
programme.desc: Host Laura Rutledge takes the helm of this weekday show featuring the likes of Marcus Spears, Dan Orlovsky, Mina Kimes, and Adam Schefter. The "NFL Live" crew entertains fans while offering all the latest news and analysis from across the NFL.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Pardon the Interruption
programme.desc: The debate is the story in this fast-paced, half-hour series hosted by former Washington Post sportswriters Tony Kornheiser and Michael Wilbon. The pair engage in high-energy discussions, conduct interviews and often argue over topics not even related to sports. Other sports reporters appear as guests and offer opinions on the top stories of the day.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: The Last Dance
programme.desc: In the fall of 1997, Michael Jordan and the Chicago Bulls begin their quest to win a sixth NBA title in eight years. But "The Last Dance," as coach Phil Jackson called it, will be shadowed by tension with the club's front office.

programme.title: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Michael Jordan is left to begin the 1997-98 season without his injured sidekick Scottie Pippen, whose contract dispute with the Bulls' front office reaches a fever pitch as the team gets off to one of the worst starts of its championship runs.

programme.title: Fishing: On the Bank
programme.desc: Rob Hughes and Andy Ford set off for the Airflo Spring Invitational 2026.

programme.desc: Song Yadong v Deiveson Figueiredo.

programme.title: Live: Roland Garros 360
programme.desc: Coverage from around the courts on day 10 of the Grand Slam tournament at Stade Roland Garros in Paris, featuring quarter-final matches.

programme.title: Live: Roland Garros
programme.desc: Further coverage from the first day of the quarter-finals of the tournament, which takes place at Stade Roland Garros in Paris.

programme.title: MLB Highlights
programme.desc: Action from Major League Baseball.

programme.title: Alcaraz-Sinner: The New Dawn of Tennis
programme.desc: A documentary that traces the rise of Carlos Alcaraz and Jannik Sinner, revealing how the two young stars are redefining the sport for a new generation.

programme.title: Live: Roland Garros
programme.desc: Further coverage from the first day of the quarter-finals of the tournament, which takes place at Stade Roland Garros in Paris. American Coco Gauff won her quarter-final match against Madison Keys thanks to a 6-7, 6-4, 6-1 victory. Last year's runner-up Aryna Sabalenka beat China's Zheng Qinwen in straight sets at this stage last year, winning 7-6, 6-3.

programme.desc: Song Yadong v Deiveson Figueiredo.

programme.desc: A look back at all of the biggest stories and best action from the 17th round of fixtures, including Bristol Bears v Bath Rugby, Saracens v Harlequins, and more.

programme.title: No Filter Football
programme.desc: A special behind-the-scenes look at the Women's FA Cup Final, as WSL champions Manchester City took on first-time finalists Brighton \u0026 Hove Albion.

programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at the UEFA Champions League final.

programme.desc: A look at the 2026 UEFA Champions League final in Budapest, Hungary, where Arsenal looked to dethrone Luis Enrique's Paris Saint-Germain.

programme.title: UEFA Europa League & Conference League Magazine
programme.desc: Following Aston Villa's triumph, relive every stage of the 2025/26 UEFA Europa League, with contributions from Morgan Rogers, John McGinn and others.

programme.desc: Milwaukee Brewers v San Francisco Giants (Start-time 12.40am). Coverage of the National League match from American Family Field.

programme.desc: A review of the biggest moments and best action from the 2025/26 season.

programme.title: Premier League Review
programme.desc: Reliving the best goals of the 2025/26 season, including fantastic finishes by Antoine Semenyo, Alex Iwobi, and Dominik Szoboszlai.

programme.title: UEFA Conference League Goals Reload
programme.desc: A look back at the best goals from the quarter-finals, semi-finals and final.

programme.desc: A round-up of all the latest action and stories.

programme.desc: A review of the eighth round of the season in Korea.

programme.title: MotoGP Rewind
programme.desc: A look back at the 2026 MotoGP Grand Prix of Italy.

programme.title: World Superbike Rewind
programme.desc: Action from the latest round of the season in Aragon, Spain.

programme.title: Premier League Stories
programme.desc: An interview with former Leeds United and Newcastle United star Lee Bowyer.

programme.title: MLB Lead Off
programme.desc: A look at the upcoming MLB action.

programme.title: Live MLB
programme.desc: Philadelphia Phillies v San Diego Padres (Start-time 11.40pm). Coverage of the National League match from Citizens Bank Park. These two teams last met in San Diego in July last year in a three-match series. The Padres won the first two games 4-2 and 5-4 before the Phillies picked up a 2-1 consolation victory.

programme.title: Live: College Baseball
programme.desc: All the action from college baseball.

programme.title: Live: College Baseball
programme.desc: All the action from college baseball.

programme.title: SEC Inside
programme.desc: Each week, a half-hour episode will focus on a select team and explore previously unaired footage and sounds from game preparation, the sideline and following the final whistle.

programme.title: 2026 Women's College World Series
programme.desc: From Devon Park in Oklahoma City, Okla.

programme.title: Live: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle
programme.desc: Start the day off right with Chris Canty, Evan Cohen and Michelle Smallmon providing an energizing and informative way to take on the day. Sports, life and laughter are what it's all about.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: Texas plays No. 6 Duke in the Dick Vitale Invitational from the Spectrum Center in North Carolina. The Blue Devils move on from teenage sensation Cooper Flagg, but welcome five-star recruit and two-time Gatorade Player of the Year Cameron Boozer.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: Storied programs in the No. 5 Blue Devils and No. 24 Jayhawks meet in the Champions Classic. Duke freshman forward Cameron Boozer, son of former Blue Devils star Carlos, averages 22.5 points per game after dropping 35 in his last outing.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: The Blue Devils (8-0) host the defending champion Gators (5-2) in an elite SEC/ACC Challenge match. Duke is 2-0 against the SEC this season, boasting wins over Texas and Arkansas on neutral courts. Florida has won six straight against ACC foes.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: No. 6 Duke hosts Georgia Tech at Cameron Indoor Stadium as ACC play heats up. Star Cameron Boozer leads the Blue Devils' offense while Kowacie Reeves Jr. anchors the Yellow Jackets. Duke aims to hold its rank in this marquee conference clash.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: No. 6 Duke faces No. 16 Louisville at the KFC Yum! Center. The Blue Devils rely on Cooper Boozer's 23.5 points per game. The Cardinals enter at 11-2 following a win over Cal, led by Ryan Conwell. Both teams clash to remain unbeaten in ACC play.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: The No. 24 SMU Mustangs visit the No. 6 Duke Blue Devils at Cameron Indoor Stadium. The freshman phenom Cameron Boozer leads Duke in scoring 23.3 PPG and rebounding 9.7 RPG. The engine of the Mustangs, Boopie Miller, scores 20.6 PPG and 7.1 APG.

programme.title: Sports Centre
programme.desc: Round-up of the sports news with live analysis and comments, plus extended interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: SSN @ 10
programme.desc: Join the Sky Sports News team for an evening round up of the day's biggest stories.

programme.title: Sky Sports News
programme.desc: Round-up of the sports news with live analysis and comments, plus extended interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: Live WNBA: Storm @ Wings
programme.desc: The Dallas Wings face the Seattle Storm in the WNBA Commissioner's Cup.

programme.title: Live WNBA: Lynx @ Mercury
programme.desc: The Phoenix Mercury face the Minnesota Lynx in the WNBA.

programme.title: Sky Sports News
programme.desc: Round-up of the sports news with live analysis and comments, plus extended interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: Sky Sports Breakfast
programme.desc: Stay across the biggest sports stories this morning with a wrap-up of the headlines.

programme.title: Sky Sports News
programme.desc: Round-up of the sports news with live analysis and comments, plus extended interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: Lunchtime Live
programme.desc: Sit down with Sky Sports News as the team break down all the sports stories making the headlines this lunchtime.

programme.title: Sports Desk
programme.desc: A breakdown of the stories hitting the news desk this afternoon, with live analysis and comment plus extended interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: Sky Sports News
programme.desc: Round-up of the sports news with live analysis and comments, plus extended interviews with the headline makers.

programme.desc: The third and final women's T20I between England and India in Taunton.

programme.desc: Round-up of the sports news with live analysis and comments, plus extended interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From PNC Park in Pittsburgh.

programme.title: Charlie Moore Outdoors
programme.desc: A social media post haunts Charlie as someone claims to have found the lost lake in the state of Florida. Mad Fish and the crew head to Florida in search of the lost lake.

programme.title: Charlie Moore: No Offense
programme.desc: Fishing enthusiast Charlie Moore, also known as "The Mad Fisherman," is stepping out of his comfort zone and into the worlds of his guests, but first they have to visit his. In each episode, a special guest is invited into Charlie's world, and then the roles are reversed. When it's his turn, Charlie immerses himself in the local culture of the town he visits, wanting to experience everything that

programme.title: The Varsity With John Ourand
programme.desc: John Ourand and a rotating cast of industry insiders take you inside the executive suites and owners boxes where the decisions that shape the entire sports business are made; you'll hear interviews with players, execs and everyone in between.

programme.title: USL Championship Soccer
programme.desc: From Highmark Stadium in Pittsburgh.

programme.title: Riverhounds Coaches Show
programme.desc: Get the information on the Pittsburgh Riverhounds featuring head coach Rob Vincent, player guests and host Robby Incmikoski.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: From the Gardens Casino in Hawaiian Gardens, Calif.

programme.title: The Varsity With John Ourand
programme.desc: John Ourand and a rotating cast of industry insiders take you inside the executive suites and owners boxes where the decisions that shape the entire sports business are made; you'll hear interviews with players, execs and everyone in between.

programme.title: World Class Championship Boxing
programme.desc: From New York City.

programme.title: Fight Sports MMA
programme.desc: The event has become an annual tradition to honor the best fighters and moments in MMA over the previous year, including awards for male and female Fighter of the Year, Knockout of the Year, Fight of the Year, and many, many more.

programme.title: World Championship Kickboxing
programme.desc: Highlights from some of the world's greatest kickboxing matches.

programme.title: Steel City Chronicles
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of one of Pittsburgh Penguins legends, Jaromir Jagr.

programme.title: Pure Outdoor
programme.desc: Outdoor sports from all over the world, from freestyle ski jumping to airplane aerobatics.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Blake Shreddy Wilkey and Harrison Weiss tear up the dunes in Ocotillo Wells.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Tau Au is a Toyota Series Western Division Champion; he walks us through the impact fishing has had on his life.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Pro Footvolley Tour
programme.desc: Shake the winter blues on sun-kissed Hollywood Beach with the exciting hybrid of soccer and volleyball.

programme.title: World Chase Tag
programme.desc: Parkour and Ninja Warrior athletes compete against each other in high-level action matches of tag during international tournaments.

programme.title: FIBA World Basketball
programme.desc: Weekly wrap-up of basketball action from around the world including features on the world's top players, leagues and tournaments.

programme.title: World Tennis With Harry Cicma
programme.desc: Featuring exclusive interviews and features with the biggest names in tennis.

programme.title: She's in the Game
programme.desc: Meet the next generation of superstar female athletes around the country as we go behind the scenes to shine the light on them and their interests off the field, along with catching up with the female legends who paved the way for all this growth.

programme.title: The Card Life
programme.desc: To celebrate Matt Strahm's return to the Royals, he is joined by some of MLB's biggest collectors in KC. Justin Topa and Mick Abel join Matt for a baseball card pack draft, and Bobby Witt Jr. tries to identify when the photos on his cards were taken.

programme.title: Hobby House
programme.desc: This month, Hobby House is at Spring Training in Florida and talking cards with Phillies legends Juan Samuel and Greg Luzinski. We also stop by a card show and take some well-used vintage cards to CGC headquarters for grading.

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: Periods of unrivaled domination in sport, including chapters from sport's greatest careers and iconic dynasties.

programme.title: The Iconic
programme.desc: Stories behind celebrated events, institutions, clubs, players, rivalries and moments in sport.

programme.title: The Short List
programme.desc: Roger and Mirka Federer; Tiger Woods; Lindsey Vonn.

programme.title: Fair Territory with Ken Rosenthal
programme.desc: MLB insider Ken Rosenthal covers baseball's latest news and pressing issues.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Daikin Park in Houston.

programme.title: ATP Encore
programme.desc: Rafael Jodar vs. Joao Fonseca.

programme.title: Academy Life
programme.desc: Behind-the-scenes at top tennis academies.

programme.desc: Mirra Andreeva (RUS) vs. Hailey Baptiste (USA).

programme.desc: Coverage from Paris.

programme.desc: From Roland Garros Stadium in Paris.

programme.desc: Men's, Women's & Mixed Doubles Quarterfinals; Boys' & Girls' 2nd Round & Doubles 1st and 2nd Round.

programme.title: Fairways of Life
programme.desc: New York Times's Best Seller and Golf Channel Host Matt Adams provides unforgettable interviews with golf's legends and stars, as well as lively interactive discussions about the game, travel and the latest in golf equipment.

programme.title: 18 Holes With Natalie Gulbis and Jimmy Hanlin
programme.desc: Jimmy Hanlin and Natalie Gulbis showcase some of the best golf destinations.

programme.title: Golfing the World
programme.desc: Highlighting golf courses and private resorts from around the world.

programme.title: Golf Life
programme.desc: Featuring the latest trends, tours of the finest courses and tips from golf experts.

programme.title: The Contenders 2026
programme.desc: Previewing all the competing teams.

programme.title: Major League Fishing
programme.desc: Four teams compete in knockout match 1 to advance to the championship. From Shreveport-Bossier City, La.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Stephanie Lawson shares her journey of becoming a tournament angler and how the experience has transformed her outlook on life, offering new perspectives both on and off the water.

programme.title: Pure Outdoor
programme.desc: Outdoor sports from all over the world, from freestyle ski jumping to airplane aerobatics.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Adrenaline-pumping action, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable encounter off-road.

programme.title: She's in the Game
programme.desc: Meet the next generation of superstar female athletes around the country as we go behind the scenes to shine the light on them and their interests off the field, along with catching up with the female legends who paved the way for all this growth.

programme.title: Sports Stars of Tomorrow
programme.desc: Profiles of the top rookie, college and high-school talent in sports; current athletes share their experiences, advice and personal impressions of the road to stardom.

programme.title: The Short List
programme.desc: The sports countdown, featuring iconic themes focused upon the memorable moments and individuals in sports; the 10 memorable debuts, the 10 revered innovators, the comebacks of all time and much more.

programme.desc: Periods of unrivaled domination in sport, including chapters from sport's greatest careers and iconic dynasties.

programme.title: Golfing the World
programme.desc: Highlighting golf courses and private resorts from around the world.

programme.title: Golf Life
programme.desc: Featuring the latest trends, tours of the finest courses and tips from golf experts.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Live: Moser, Lombardi & Kane on Altitude Radio 92.5
Live: Moser, Lombardi & Kane on Altitude Radio 92.5
Live: Moser, Lombardi & Kane on Altitude Radio 92.5
Altitude Extra
programme.desc: Vic Lombardi sat down with Denver Nuggets legend Dan Issel to discuss his basketball career, his involvement with horse racing and his evaluation of Nikola Jokić.

programme.title: The Contenders 2026
programme.desc: Previewing all the competing teams.

programme.title: Moser, Lombardi & Kane on Altitude Radio 92.5
Major League Fishing
programme.desc: Four teams compete in knockout match 1 to advance to the championship. From Shreveport-Bossier City, La.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Stephanie Lawson shares her journey of becoming a tournament angler and how the experience has transformed her outlook on life, offering new perspectives both on and off the water.

programme.title: Pure Outdoor
programme.desc: Outdoor sports from all over the world, from freestyle ski jumping to airplane aerobatics.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Adrenaline-pumping action, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable encounter off-road.

programme.title: She's in the Game
programme.desc: Meet the next generation of superstar female athletes around the country as we go behind the scenes to shine the light on them and their interests off the field, along with catching up with the female legends who paved the way for all this growth.

programme.title: Sports Stars of Tomorrow
programme.desc: Profiles of the top rookie, college and high-school talent in sports; current athletes share their experiences, advice and personal impressions of the road to stardom.

programme.title: The Short List
programme.desc: The sports countdown, featuring iconic themes focused upon the memorable moments and individuals in sports; the 10 memorable debuts, the 10 revered innovators, the comebacks of all time and much more.

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: Periods of unrivaled domination in sport, including chapters from sport's greatest careers and iconic dynasties.

programme.desc: Another chance to watch today's racing action from Gowran and Listowel.

programme.desc: Today's live racing action from Pontefract.

programme.title: Racing Replay

programme.title: Realtree Monster Bucks
programme.desc: It's no secret that the Midwest is one of the best places to take a monster buck. Join Tyler Jordan as he takes a look at some monster buck hunts from the Midwest.

programme.title: The Gamekeepers of Mossy Oak
programme.desc: This week, we're talking about grabbling catfish! Our guests Geoffrey King, Corey Stouts, and Ted Swords of North Mississippi are experts in the art of grabbling. Each has caught catfish over 70 pounds with their bare hands.

programme.title: Adventures of Chapo Gringo
programme.desc: A character-driven outdoor and travel series following Chapo Gringo as he moves through hunting camps, ranches, border towns, and remote places-meeting real people, telling real stories, and keeping things human.

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Roger runs into trouble with a neighbor as he hunts for a trophy buck in Oklahoma.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve goes on a solo hunt with his muzzleloader.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve hunts turkeys at Yturria Ranch with Luke Combs.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Jax heads to Alaska with Melissa and Ben to experience an incredible black bear adventure.

programme.title: Bloodline Hunting
programme.desc: Travel with Matt Bullins as he journeys through grassroots America, seeking out new adventures and uncovering the rich bloodlines that define our hunting culture. Along the way, he highlights the people, histories, and experiences that keep these timeless traditions thriving.

programme.title: Night Crew
programme.desc: There's some abilities that can't be taught.

programme.title: Steve's Outdoor Adventures
programme.desc: Steve West takes Bruno Beccaria from Burris Optics on a West Texas Sheep Hunt.

programme.title: Art of Wild
programme.desc: Nick relives one of his most memorable elk hunts of all time with his Grandpa in Colorado.

programme.title: Predator Pursuit
programme.desc: Jeff is hunting predators in West Texas.

programme.title: MOJO TV
programme.desc: Innovative designs for new hunting products.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's: The Professionals
programme.desc: Conservation mission to live capture and study jaguars.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve goes on a solo hunt with his muzzleloader.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve hunts turkeys at Yturria Ranch with Luke Combs.

programme.desc: There's some abilities that can't be taught.

programme.title: Steve's Outdoor Adventures
programme.desc: Steve West takes Bruno Beccaria from Burris Optics on a West Texas Sheep Hunt.

programme.title: Art of Wild
programme.desc: Nick relives one of his most memorable elk hunts of all time with his Grandpa in Colorado.

programme.title: Predator Pursuit
programme.desc: Jeff is hunting predators in West Texas.

programme.title: MOJO TV
programme.desc: Innovative designs for new hunting products.

programme.title: Hit Squad Outdoors With Tim Sylvia
programme.desc: This week we have Banks Murphy and Grant Boies, and they are after turkeys.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: An expert forager and chef shows how people can find food on state land. A Michigan Conservation Officer find a campfire that's unattended.

programme.title: Grace Camo and Lace
programme.desc: Grace, Camo & Lace follows the Armstrong sisters on hunting adventures across North America. While in pursuit of big and small game, Alli and Adriana bring a fresh look and youthful energy to the hunting industry. The sisters have been hunting since they were five years old and share a passion for hunting and the outdoor lifestyle. The entire Armstrong family gets in on the action as they join All

programme.title: The Gamekeepers of Mossy Oak
programme.desc: This week, we're talking about grabbling catfish! Our guests Geoffrey King, Corey Stouts, and Ted Swords of North Mississippi are experts in the art of grabbling. Each has caught catfish over 70 pounds with their bare hands.

programme.title: In Fisherman TV
programme.desc: Fundamental to the existence of In-Fisherman is the pioneering spirit to discover the hottest presentations happening for any given season; so the staff highlights the most productive new crawfish soft trailers for largemouth bass.

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: Johnny Shucks, of Shucks Maine Lobster, invites Tommy for a tour of a lobster processing facility like no other.

programme.title: Two Conchs Adventures
programme.desc: Join JC and Tucker as they experience everything that the beautiful country of Panama has to offer.

programme.title: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks
programme.desc: Accomplished angler Dustin Wilks fishes various bass fishing locations and teaches how to find and catch more fish. Loaded with fish catches, Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks is a show that is action-packed and shows the viewer numerous techniques for catching bass. Dustin's straightforward approach coupled with his whimsical demeanor makes Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks the perfect teaching platf

programme.title: Angling Edge
programme.desc: Al Lindner and Mike Hehner spotlight northern sunfish varieties and their hybrid offspring.

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: Two current DUTV co-hosts come together; Fred Zink joins Colin Mulligan on Colin's home turf for a cold weather adventure for ducks and geese.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Jax heads to Alaska with Melissa and Ben to experience an incredible black bear adventure.

programme.title: Winchester & Drury's Natural Born
programme.desc: The Drury Outdoors Team hunts game and offers tips.

programme.title: MTN Top Outdoors
programme.desc: Hunting, fishing and wild game cooking from the woods of Southwestern Pennsylvania to the bountiful walleye waters of the Great Lakes Region.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: A closer look at the Eichler Field to Table lifestyle; a combination of the daily challenges of ranching, farming and running an outfitting business in Colorado.

programme.title: Dropped: Project Origin
programme.desc: The top of the food chain comes into question as the Keefer brothers find themselves between a grizzly and a wolf.

programme.title: JT Kenney's Florida Bass
programme.desc: Join pro angler JT Kenney as he embarks on an epic journey across Florida, navigating its diverse waters in pursuit of monstrous bass, showcasing the thrill of the chase and the beauty of the Sunshine State's landscapes.

programme.title: Angling Edge
programme.desc: Al Lindner and Mike Hehner spotlight northern sunfish varieties and their hybrid offspring.

programme.title: Fishing 411
programme.desc: Host and producer Mark Romanack shares his 30-plus years of professional fishing savvy with viewers.

programme.title: Hook the Future
programme.desc: Caleb, Weston, and Capt. Don join Capt David Case chasing hard fighting gag grouper on the shallow water reefs out of Crystal River, FL.

programme.title: Art of Wild
programme.desc: Nick relives one of his most memorable elk hunts of all time with his Grandpa in Colorado.

programme.title: MOJO TV
programme.desc: Innovative designs for new hunting products.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: An expert forager and chef shows how people can find food on state land. A Michigan Conservation Officer find a campfire that's unattended.

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Leysath targets American Shad near Sacramento, California; known for being bony and mostly inedible, Chef Scott enlists the help of a fellow chef to show him how to cook them.

programme.title: Guns & Ammo TV
programme.desc: The innovative Caldwell ClayCopter.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Young Captain Reed Tudor hosts Captain Mike in Duck Key, FL and puts him on Micro Tarpon, Redfish and Goliath Grouper.

programme.title: Hook the Future
programme.desc: Caleb, Weston, and Capt. Don join Capt David Case chasing hard fighting gag grouper on the shallow water reefs out of Crystal River, FL.

programme.title: Heartland Waterfowl
programme.desc: The crew joins S Bar Outfitters in Oklahoma for duck and goose hunting, highlighted by spins of wigeon and textbook Lesser Canada goose decoying.

programme.title: Our Way of Life
programme.desc: Heather and Mike will demonstrate the cultural importance of Náxw, the traditional wooden halibut hooks used by Tlingit people for centuries.

programme.title: Relentless Pursuit
programme.desc: Join the Slock Master for an action-packed voyage into the past where primitive hunting is relived by the world's most recognized authority in spear and blowgun hunting. Laugh or cry, Tim Wells delivers every time.

programme.title: Pigman: The Series
programme.desc: Brian Pigman Quaca is a true-blue original-an unapologetic, high-energy host with a larger-than-life personality that has redefined outdoor television. With an unrelenting passion for the chase, Pigman takes on the world's toughest hunts, using any legal means necessary to put game on the ground. While his reputation was built on hardcore hog hunting, don't be mistaken-his skills extend far beyond

programme.desc: Steve takes Evan Hafer, lead singer of Turnpike Troubadours, on his first Alaskan black bear hunt.

programme.desc: Steve travels to Tanzania for his first ever hunt in Africa.

programme.title: Wildfly Best of
programme.desc: We embark on an exciting quest to target the prolific yellowfish of Sterkfontein Dam using dry fly techniques. Experience the thrill of sight fishing for these stunning species in crystal-clear waters, surrounded by breathtaking scenery.

programme.desc: Lisa hosts an unforgettable weekend at Nordic Lodge in Saskatchewan, where a group of adventurous women chase pike and lake trout and discover the joy, laughter, and connection that comes with fishing together.

programme.desc: Mark Melnyk is in Montrose, Colorado fishing the Gunnison River with Ed's Fly Shop for trout.

programme.title: Bass Pro Shops Fisherman's Handbook
programme.desc: We're going into the world of saltwater in this episode of the Bass Pro Shops Fisherman's Handbook. We'll look at a variety of fishing trips to showcase redfishing, speckled trout as well as the tactics to catch them. programme.title: Live: NHL Tonight: First Shift
programme.desc: A conversational style show featuring hard-hitting opinions and analysis on the news of the day, the daily program will be co-hosted by longtime NHL Network broadcaster EJ Hradek and a rotating group of NHL Network analysts.

programme.title: Live: NHL Now
programme.desc: Gear up for the night's hockey action with expert pregame analysis, exclusive insight from morning skates, and reporting from correspondents around the league.

programme.title: Plays of the Month - Countdown
programme.desc: Highlighting the past month's best in daily sports moments.

programme.title: Live: Blue Jays Central
programme.desc: Toronto Blue Jays pregame show hosted by Jamie Campbell.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Blue Jays and Braves square off to launch a highly competitive three-game regular set. Kazuma Okamoto leads Toronto with 12 home runs, while Drake Baldwin responds with 13 homers for Atlanta. Both teams fight to maintain strong positioning.

programme.title: Live: The Carton Show with Craig Carton & Chris McMonigle
programme.desc: Craig Carton & Chris McMonigle take on major sports storylines featuring heated debates and strong, often controversial, opinions.

programme.title: Live: Baseball Night in N.Y.
programme.desc: A cast of leading New York baseball writers and other experts to discuss the latest off-season news involving the Mets, Yankees, and key division rivals.

programme.title: Mets Classics
programme.desc: From Sept. 11, 2024. Mets come back to rise over the Blue Jays.

programme.title: Live: Mets Pregame
programme.desc: Analyst Gary Apple along with special guests preview the upcoming New York Mets game and series, as well as recapping past performances.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From T-Mobile Park in Seattle.

programme.title: Live: Mets Postgame
programme.desc: Analyst Gary Apple along with special guests review highlights from the previous New York Mets game, as well as giving extended commentary and in-depth insight to the team's overall performance.

programme.title: Live: SportsNite
programme.desc: SportsNite takes viewers inside all things New York sports by discussing the latest sports news of the night.

programme.title: Live: The FAN Pregame
programme.desc: Ailish Forfar and Justin Cuthbert discuss the stories that matter most to sports fans.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Tigers and Rays open a three-game regular-season series driven by elite contact bats. Riley Greene hits a stellar .304 to anchor the Tigers, while Yandy Díaz counters with a .311 batting average for the Rays. Both teams look to open June strong.

programme.title: Live: Sportsnet Central
programme.desc: Canada's premier destination for sports and analysis.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Dodgers and Diamondbacks square off to launch a competitive four-game division set.Andy Pages leads Los Angeles with 13 home runs, while a stellar .293 batting average from Corbin Carroll keys the Diamondbacks run production in defending at home.

programme.title: Live: 2026 Stanley Cup Final
programme.desc: The Hurricanes and Golden Knights clash in Game 1 of the best-of-seven Stanley Cup Final. Carolina brings a stellar 12-1 playoff record into the series, while Vegas responds with a 12-5 postseason mark after sweeping its prior round.
